title: Even Number Generator
description: Write a generator function called even_numbers(limit) that yields all even numbers from 0 up to (and including) the given limit. Then use a for loop to iterate over even_numbers(10) and print each value on its own line.
starter_code:
# Write your generator function here
def even_numbers(limit):
    # Use a for loop and yield
    pass

# Iterate and print
for num in even_numbers(10):
    print(num)
hints: Use a for loop with range(limit + 1) and check if each number is even with i % 2 == 0
Inside the if block, use yield i to produce the even number
Your for loop at the bottom is already correct — just fill in the generator function body

code_requirements.description: Uses the yield keyword inside the generator
code_requirements.fail_message: Your function must use the yield keyword to be a proper generator. Using return will not work here.
